assumptions: LR_size_resizeType 'shortEdge'/'longEdge' require SDK 9.0+ (LR Classic >= 9.0). Safe given plan's LR >= 13 minimum.
extractFileNumber returns the first underscore-prefixed digit run, not the final digit group — so IMG_0001-Edit-2.DNG returns '0001', not '2'. Documented in utils_spec.lua.
slugify is ASCII-only: accented characters (multi-byte UTF-8) are stripped by the [a-zA-Z0-9-] character class. Documented in spec comment.
joinPath trims trailing slashes from each segment in the fallback path (LrPathUtils not available under busted).
Local Lightroom SDK not found at /Applications/Adobe Lightroom Classic/SDK/. All SDK constants sourced from community documentation.
LR_outputSharpeningLevel 2 = Standard is consistent across all three presets per plan spec.
busted specs do not use require('spec_helper') — the .busted 'helper' config already runs spec_helper.lua, which sets up package.path. Explicit require removed to avoid double-load error.
